overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candles, long house tables with students, and elaborate stained glass windows at the far end. The warm candlelight illuminates the stone architecture as the camera holds a steady view from the center aisle.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand gothic great hall filled with students dining at long house tables. Floating candles illuminate the space with warm golden light, while a large stained glass window dominates the far wall. The camera remains stationary in the center aisle, capturing the bustling yet orderly atmosphere of the dining hall with the house banner prominently displayed in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic gaze into a grand gothic dining hall that maintains a consistent atmosphere of warmth and academic grandeur. It begins with a stationary view from the center aisle, where the space is filled with students dining at long house tables. As the eye takes in the scene, the warm golden light from floating candles illuminates the stone architecture and the bustling activity of the hall. The perspective remains fixed, allowing the house banner in the foreground to frame the view before the gaze settles on the large, elaborate stained glass window dominating the far wall.
